text:
Created attachment 231455
patch for print/epson-inkjet-printer-escpr

epson-inkjet-printer-escpr has been updated to 1.7.18.

--- epson-inkjet-printer-escpr-1.7.17/NEWS      2021-08-05 06:51:23.000000000 +0000
+++ epson-inkjet-printer-escpr-1.7.18/NEWS      2022-01-24 04:24:43.000000000 +0000
@@ -1,6 +1,16 @@
 NEWS -- an overview of user-visible changes with each release
 
 ----------------------------------------------------------------------
+epson-inkjet-printer-escpr-1.7.18                         (2022-01-24)
+----------------------------------------------------------------------
+* Supported new model.
+
+----------------------------------------------------------------------
+epson-inkjet-printer-escpr-1.7.17.1                       (2021-12-22)
+----------------------------------------------------------------------
+* Supported new model.
+
+----------------------------------------------------------------------
 epson-inkjet-printer-escpr-1.7.17                         (2021-08-05)
 ----------------------------------------------------------------------
 * Supported new model.

New PPD files for the following models have been added.
EP-714A series
EP-814A series

ONLY_FOR_ARCHS=         aarch64

The following build by poudriere is successful.
FreeBSD 12.3-STABLE 1203505 amd64
FreeBSD 12.3-RELEASE-p1 i386
